message:
feat: expand AST/parser infrastructure, module system, and core engine subsystems

AST & Parser (ast.rs +534, parser.rs +401):
- Extend abstract syntax tree node types and parser grammar rules
- Expanded coverage for ES2020+ language constructs

Module System (module_resolver.rs +559, module_cache.rs +444, module_compatibility_matrix.rs +749):
- New module resolution with configurable search paths and specifier normalization
- Disk-backed module cache with TTL-aware eviction and deduplication
- Compatibility matrix tracking cross-module version constraints and breakage vectors

Core Engine (lib.rs +275, object_model.rs, slot_registry.rs +519, gc.rs +192):
- Updated module exports integrating all new subsystems
- Extended slot registry with indexed property storage and inline caching
- Garbage collector foundation with mark-sweep tracing roots
- Object model refinements for proxy and descriptor invariants

Infrastructure (control_plane/mod.rs +169, cross_repo_contract.rs, key_derivation.rs,
activation_lifecycle.rs, lowering_pipeline.rs):
- Control plane module organization for policy routing
- Cross-repo contract enforcement for shared-boundary changes
- Key derivation and activation lifecycle management updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
